title: Hi guys! Been working on a no-code trading platform for 18 months. Would love your feedback
author: Ordinary_Mode1011
selftext:
Hey everyone!

For the last 18 months I've been developing SignalForge. Started because people kept asking me to code their strategies for them, and I thought - why not make something where anyone can build strategies without coding?



What it does:

\- Build strategies with drag-and-drop (supports cross-timeframe, multiple symbols, etc)

\- Scan entire market to find where your conditions are true

\- Backtest with server-side verification (no fake results possible)

\- Marketplace where you can share strategies but keep code private

\- Custom indicators in JavaScript if you want to code

\- Session analysis, regime analysis, time-based performance breakdowns



Here's a backtest I ran to test the engine:

[https://signalforge.io/backtest-result/9e7c7178-c162-4d9e-9067-32785ebe4643](https://signalforge.io/backtest-result/9e7c7178-c162-4d9e-9067-32785ebe4643)



You can check out all the metrics and analysis. I kept my strategy private but made performance public.

Still adding features like news sentiment, economic data triggers, and hopefully paper trading soon.

Would really appreciate any feedback! What features would be most useful for you? What problems do you face with current tools?



Thanks for reading! Happy to answer any questions 😊

https://preview.redd.it/9mitlmju5cof1.png?width=820&format=png&auto=webp&s=e61fcd86016818bd412eae6f167e9d41a32fc2eb

comments.author: Charming_Snow_9694
comments.body: thats actually amazing, where can i get an access, I wanna test it myself

comments.author: CashFlowDay
comments.body: Could you please share the number of trades you have done, your per trade ROI over how days or weeks? How many months of Sharpe Ratio do you have? Answers to these questions will help me and others to decide how much to pay for your service.

replies.author: Ordinary_Mode1011
replies.body:
Hey thanks for the question. Just to clear it up I’m not sharing a strategy for sale here. This is only a proof of concept backtest so you can see how SignalForge runs analytics like ROI, Sharpe ratio, trade logs, and performance breakdowns.

You can check the full results here (works best on desktop):
👉 https://signalforge.io/backtest-result/9e7c7178-c162-4d9e-9067-32785ebe4643

SignalForge is a SaaS platform I’m building where traders can create their own strategies, backtest them server side, scan markets, and eventually share or sell strategies in a marketplace. Backtesting is just one piece of the whole platform.

If you want to try it out you can join the free beta waitlist at https://signalforge.io/waitlist.

Would love to hear what you think of the analytics so far and what features you feel are missing or would make it more useful.

comments.author: Careless-Diamond-277
comments.body: You have a link to it? I might Check it out
